_note: UnsignedIP::bytes() layout golden (specs/05 §1.6, specs/15 §4.1): ip.As16()(16) || port_be(2) || timestamp_be(8). The As16 of an IPv4 address is its IPv4-mapped IPv6 form (00*10 || ffff || 4 IPv4 octets), matching Go netip.Addr.As16() as used in network/peer/ip.go::UnsignedIP.bytes(). Cross-checked against the documented Packer layout (PackFixedBytes(16) || PackShort || PackLong).
